extortion.description: Buddemeyer is a national leader in the top segment of the bed, table and bath market. Quality products and excellence. Meet! Buddemeyer has been synonymous with tradition since 1951. It has exclusive products that follow the principles of German quality that allied to high technology, provide high performance and innovation. We are specialists in home products such as bath towels, carpet coordination and bathrobes, all made with 100% cotton long fibers, pre-washed and pre-shrunk, unicolor and red yarnBUDDEMEYER.COM.BR
